summary: Comprehensive testing of updated GeoHunter AI geolocation app completed successfully. All requested features verified: professional design, Google Maps enrichment, JPEG/PNG/WEBP upload support, interactive map, and AI analysis integration. Both backend APIs and frontend UI are fully functional with excellent professional styling.
passed_tests: GPT-5.2 + Gemini AI dual analysis functional
Google Maps API integration (geocoding, place_details, nearby_places)
Image analysis with Google Maps enrichment working
Interactive Leaflet map with custom markers
Results panel displaying AI analyses + Google Maps data
File format validation and error handling
